title: KafkaWorkItemEvent
description: Message published to work-items.ingest topic to trigger ingestion of a new work item.

tenantId.description: Tenant that owns this work item.

workflowType.description: Identifies the workflow type; must match an active IngestionConfig.

sourceRef.description: Opaque reference to the upstream source record (e.g. topic-partition-offset).

rawFields.description: Flat map of source field names to string values. Field mapping to WorkItem.fields is driven by IngestionConfig.

makerUserId.description: User ID of the initiating actor. Null for system-generated events.
